name: Tag
description: Tag component is used to categorize content.

props.name: value
props.description: Value to display inside the tag.

props.name: rounded
props.description: Whether the corners of the tag are rounded.

props.name: icon
props.description: Icon of the tag to display next to the value.

props.name: unstyled
props.description: When enabled, it removes component related styles in the core.
